alternatenames.name: ๑ คืนปริศนาเกมล่ามนุษย์หมาป่า
One Night Ultimate Werewolf: ΛΥΚΑΝΘΡΩΠΟΣ ΓΙΑ ΜΙΑ ΝΥΧΤΑ

meta.description:
No moderator, no elimination, ten-minute games.

One Night Ultimate Werewolf is a fast game for 3-10 players in which everyone gets a role: One of the dastardly Werewolves, the tricky Troublemaker, the helpful Seer, or one of a dozen different characters, each with a special ability. In the course of a single morning, your village will decide who is a werewolf...because all it takes is lynching one werewolf to win!

Because One Night Ultimate Werewolf is so fast, fun, and engaging, you'll want to play it again and again, and no two games are ever the same.

This game can be combined with One Night Ultimate Werewolf: Daybreak.
meta.wiki:
Microbadges:

Contents:
  • 16 Role Tiles:
    • 3 x Villager
    • 1 x Troublemaker
    • 2 x Masons
    • 2 x Werewolves
    • 1 x Tanner
    • 1 x Insomniac
    • 1 x Seer
    • 1 x Drunk
    • 1 x Minion
    • 1 x Robber
    • 1 x Hunter
    • 1 x Doppelgänger
  • 16 Role Tokens:
    • 3 x Villager
    • 1 x Troublemaker
    • 2 x Masons
    • 2 x Werewolves
    • 1 x Tanner
    • 1 x Insomniac
    • 1 x Seer
    • 1 x Drunk
    • 1 x Minion
    • 1 x Robber
    • 1 x Hunter
    • 1 x Doppelgänger
  • Rulebook

Can I sleeve this game?

  • The role "cards" are actually thick cardboard. The Fantasy Flight Green ("Standard American") size are a good fit after some trimming. Bezier Games will also sell you ONUW fitted sleeves with the ONUW card art on the back.

Combining with One Night Ultimate Werewolf Daybreak
The card backs of various printings of this game and its sequel are all distinct, and therefore it is highly encouraged for people to sleeve their game with opaque sleeves. For ONUW and Daybreak, you want 59 x 92 mm sleeves then trim the tops. Mayday happens to sell black-colored opaque sleeves in this size: MDG-7042,

Double Sleeving and Coin Protection
The best way to double sleeve is to use Mayday 59x92mm penny sleeves inserting upside down, folding the bottom behind the card, then inserting the penny sleeved cardboard into some Dragon Shield Japanese Size Matte Sleeves. Purchased a lot of 30mm coin protectors to protect the coins of all versions of the games is also an option as it will keep everything protected from the elements.
